summary: Backend API testing completed for SnapRoad Mobile app features. All 40 API tests passed (100%). Web UI verified loading correctly with Plan Selection, Car Onboarding, and Main App screens working properly.
critical_code_review_comments: All backend APIs used by mobile app return correct data structures
Plan selection, pricing, and onboarding status endpoints working
CRUD operations for routes, reports, and friends working
Leaderboard, badges, offers, and challenges endpoints returning proper data
Session reset endpoint available for fresh testing state

success_rate.frontend: Web UI verified - Plan Selection, Car Onboarding, and Map Tab all rendering correctly

seed_data_creation: None - used existing mock data from backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs for mobile app features tested and working. Mobile app is React Native/Expo at /app/snaproad-mobile and requires mobile device/emulator for native testing. Web UI at /driver provides equivalent visual reference.

features_tested.user_profile: PASS - Profile returns all required fields (id, name, gems, level, safety_score, etc.)
features_tested.plan_selection: PASS - Get pricing, select basic/premium plans, verify plan updates
features_tested.car_onboarding: PASS - Get/update car configuration (category, variant, color)
features_tested.routes_tab: PASS - CRUD operations on saved routes working
features_tested.offers: PASS - Get offers with tiered discounts (6% basic, 18% premium)
features_tested.challenges: PASS - Get challenges with progress tracking
features_tested.badges: PASS - Get badges by category, 160 total badges available
features_tested.friends_hub: PASS - Get friends, search by ID, add/remove friends
features_tested.road_reports: PASS - Get/create/delete reports, all 5 report types work
features_tested.trip_history: PASS - Trip history with stats (total_trips, total_miles, avg_safety_score)
features_tested.driving_score: PASS - Overall score with metrics breakdown
features_tested.session_reset: PASS - Reset user to fresh state for testing

mocked_data_note: ALL BACKEND DATA IS MOCKED in-memory in server.py. No real database integration. This is suitable for UI development and testing but will need persistence layer for production.
